name: ui-castle-board
description: CastleBoard — build-and-defend: game-shell + canvas-2d with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects.

schema.name: ui-castle-board
schema.description: CastleBoard — build-and-defend: game-shell + canvas-2d with LOLO-driven sprite animation and combat effects.

emits.description: Called when a unit is clicked
Called when any tile is clicked
Emitted when the player defeats the current wave
Emitted when the castle takes damage from an enemy
Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

events.description: Called when a unit is clicked

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Called when any tile is clicked

events.name: Castle Hit

events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

units.label: Units
units.description: Initial garrison and enemy units seeded into entity on INIT.

tiles.label: Tiles

assetManifest.label: Asset Manifest
assetManifest.description: Direct asset manifest — takes priority over entity-derived manifest.

features.description: Initial feature / building slots seeded into entity on INIT.

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
